name: Minecraft: Paper
author: ops@refx.example
description: High-performance Paper (Spigot fork) Minecraft Java Edition server. Great default for survival/SMP communities with plugin support.

installScript.script:
#!/bin/bash
set -euo pipefail
apt-get update && apt-get install -y curl jq
cd /mnt/server
VER="${MINECRAFT_VERSION}"
if [ "$VER" = "latest" ]; then
  VER=$(curl -fsSL https://api.papermc.io/v2/projects/paper | jq -r '.versions[-1]')
fi
BUILD=$(curl -fsSL "https://api.papermc.io/v2/projects/paper/versions/${VER}/builds" | jq -r '.builds[-1].build')
JAR="paper-${VER}-${BUILD}.jar"
curl -fsSL -o "${SERVER_JARFILE}" "https://api.papermc.io/v2/projects/paper/versions/${VER}/builds/${BUILD}/downloads/${JAR}"
if [ "${EULA}" = "true" ]; then echo 'eula=true' > eula.txt; fi
echo 'Install complete.'

variables.description: The name of the server jarfile to run the server with.
The version of Paper to install. Use 'latest' for the newest stable release.
Maximum Java heap size in megabytes (-Xmx).
You must accept the Mojang EULA to run a server.
